column15: This one seems promising as it is standardized and supported by Google KMS
Similar to Falcon, but doesn't require floating point arithmetic, signing time is a lot shorter
It's better to not use since it is a stateful hashing-based algorithm (meaning we need to track number of signatures which increases complexity)
